name: slack
description: Send messages, read channels, and search Slack from TulipFarm agents.

required_env.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
required_env.label: Bot Token
required_env.description: xoxb-... token from your Slack app. Fill this to connect directly, or use OAuth below.
steps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and open your app
Click OAuth & Permissions → Install to workspace
Copy the Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...)

required_env.name: SLACK_TEAM_ID
required_env.label: Team ID
required_env.description: Your workspace ID — starts with T (e.g. T012AB3CD).
steps: The Team ID is shown in the URL as the T... segment

required_env.name: SLACK_CLIENT_ID
required_env.label: OAuth Client ID
required_env.description: App credentials → Client ID. Required only for OAuth flow.
steps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and open your app

required_env.name: SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET
required_env.label: OAuth Client Secret
required_env.description: App credentials → Client Secret. Required only for OAuth flow.
steps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and open your app
